title: tectaria subebenea
intro: Tectaria subebenea is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Tectaria subebenea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
